## Checklist

- [ ] All price data includes source provenance (seller, date, URL or reference)
- [ ] No fabricated or estimated prices submitted as observations
- [ ] Data files follow the existing YAML/JSON schema (see CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Tested locally with `bundle exec jekyll serve`
- [ ] Data validation passes (`python3 scripts/validate_data.py`)
- [ ] Commit messages are clear and descriptive
